titles.title: Lord I Give You My Heart

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This is my desire: to honor You. Lord with all my heart I worship You. All I have within me, I give You praise. All that I adore is in You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord I give You my heart, I give You my soul, I live for You alone. Every breath that I take, Every moment I'm awake, Lord have Your way in me.
